meta.university: Bangladesh University of Business and Technology (BUBT)
notes: CSE (105 people) is stored separately in bubt-cse-faculty.json, crawled from the richer cse.bubt.edu.bd subdomain. This file covers the other 12 departments.
Only TEACHING faculty were profile-crawled. Support staff (lab/office/technical) are listed name+designation only under each department's 'staff'.
Phone numbers are essentially never published on these profiles (only a couple of departments expose the BUBT main switchboard line), so phone is omitted; email is the available contact field.

Department of Data Science & Engineering is newly formed and staffed mostly by CROSS-APPOINTED CSE faculty (Aminur Rahaman, Rajibul Islam, Shawkat Ali, Shahiduzzaman, Itisha Nowrin, Ahmed Shafkat, Humayra Ferdous, Md. Nahid Hossain all also appear in CSE) — so they are double-counted across departments.
Some profiles are empty placeholder templates (name+rank only); these have email:null.
BUBT leadership note: Prof. Dr. A B M Shawkat Ali's Data Science profile lists email vc@bubt.edu.bd, indicating he is the Vice-Chancellor.

counts.note: ~8 of the 411 are CSE↔Data-Science cross-appointments (same people listed twice).
